meta.description: Play Blackjack online at Rainbet. Experience 3:2 payouts, instant play mode, and verifiable fair gaming. Start with multiple betting options from 1 to 200 chips.

content.content:
Welcome to Rainbet's Blackjack!

Blackjack Rainbet Originals is a fast-paced online blackjack game with crypto betting options and instant play features.

What is Online Blackjack?

Blackjack is a card game where players aim to beat the dealer by getting a hand value close to 21 without going over.

At Rainbet, we pay 3:2 for blackjack wins (2:1 for insurance wins). The insurance payout does not include or cover the insurance bet amount itself.

You can verify each game's fairness through our provably fair system using your seed, client seed, and nonce.

How to Play Blackjack at Rainbet

Playing blackjack on Rainbet is simple. Here's how to play:

  1. Select your bet size
  2. Get your two starting cards
  3. Choose to hit, stand, double, or split
  4. Beat the dealer to win

How to Deposit to Play Blackjack Online at Rainbet

To play Blackjack Originals on Rainbet, you first need to create an account or log in if you already have one.

Once logged in, you'll need to deposit real money to obtain Rainbet currency.

Rainbet offers many deposit options, including Pix, PicPay, Interac, and various cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin, Ethereum, and USDT. You can also purchase gift cards through Kinguin or use RuneScape Gold.

If you don't have cryptocurrency, you can buy it using MoonPay with credit cards, Apple Pay, or Google Pay.

After successfully depositing funds, you can start playing Blackjack Originals.

Remember to gamble responsibly and set limits for yourself to guarantee a safe and enjoyable gaming experience.

Basic Blackjack Rules

Our blackjack game follows standard rules with multiple player-friendly features:

  • Hit: Get another card to improve your hand
  • Stand: Keep your current hand
  • Double: Double your bet for one more card
  • Split: Create two hands from a pair
  • Insurance: Available when dealer shows an ace, pays 2:1

Rainbet Blackjack Features

We've added special features to improve your gaming experience:

  • Instant Play Mode: Skip animations for faster gameplay
  • Provably Fair Gaming: Verify each hand's fairness
  • Flexible Betting: Choose stakes from 1 to 200 fish
  • Blackjack Payout: Higher returns for natural blackjacks

Blackjack Strategy Tips

Use these basic strategies to improve your gameplay:

  • Stay with 17 or higher hands
  • Consider the dealer's visible card
  • Split aces and eights when possible
  • Use doubling down wisely
  • Verify game fairness regularly

Other Casino Games at Rainbet

Beyond blackjack, Rainbet offers various online crypto casino games.

Here are the Rainbet Originals games:

  • Chicken Cross: Bet on how far you can get across the road without falling into a trap or being ran over, you can cash out your earnings at any step.
  • Tower: Find all the gems as you climb the tower, reaching crazy multipliers as you go.
  • Rock Paper Scissors: Predict whether you will beat the house in the classic game of Rock, Paper, Scissors.
  • Wheel: Spin the Wheel, continue spinning as many rounds as you want to stack your multiplier.
  • Limbo: Bet on any number and if we roll above it you multiply your bet by the number you bet on.
  • Mines: Place your bets and clear the field of hidden gems. Pick cells carefully - one wrong move reveals a mine and ends your game.
  • Keno: Select your numbers and watch as winning spots light up. This lottery-style game offers multiple betting patterns and instant results.
  • Dice: Roll the dice and predict the outcome. Simple to learn with multiple betting options and instant wins.
  • Plinko: Drop the ball and watch it bounce through pegs. Choose your risk level and target multipliers for bigger wins.
